Package component

Class GameTile

java.lang.Object
component.GameTile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tippable
public class GameTile extends Object implements Tippable
The GameTile represents a single cell in the game grid.

It functions as a data structure that holds references to the different entities currently occupying its coordinate. It handles the presence of a Card, a Modifier, and a Mover simultaneously.

      public final int posX

  • Constructor Details

    • GameTile

      public GameTile(Modifier modifier, int posX, int posY)
      Constructs a new GameTile at a specific coordinate.
      Parameters:
      modifier - The initial logic Modifier placed on this tile.
      posX - The grid X-position.
      posY - The grid Y-position.

  • Method Details

    • getCard

      public Card getCard()
      Returns:
      The Card currently on this tile, or null if empty.

    • setCard

      public void setCard(Card card)
      Parameters:
      card - The Card to place on this tile.

    • getModifier

      public Modifier getModifier()
      Returns:
      The Modifier assigned to this tile.

    • setModifier

      public void setModifier(Modifier modifier)
      Parameters:
      modifier - The Modifier to set for this tile.

    • getMover

      public Mover getMover()
      Returns:
      The Mover assigned to this tile.

    • setMover

      public void setMover(Mover mover)
      Parameters:
      mover - The Mover to set for this tile.

    • getGridPos

      public GridPos getGridPos()
      Returns:
      A new GridPos representing this tile's coordinates.

    • getSameClassOnTile

      public GridIndexable getSameClassOnTile(GridIndexable g)
      Retrieves the component of the same class as the provided template.

      This is useful for generic systems that handle GridIndexable types without knowing explicitly which layer they are targeting.

      Parameters:
      g - A template object to match the class.
      Returns:
      The matching component instance on this tile.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the type is not Card, Modifier, or Mover.

    • setSameClassOnTile

      public void setSameClassOnTile(GridIndexable g)
      Sets a component on the tile by detecting its class type.
      Parameters:
      g - The GridIndexable entity to place on the tile.

    • removeSameClassOnTile

      public void removeSameClassOnTile(GridIndexable g)
      Clears the reference for the specific layer matching the object's type.
      Parameters:
      g - The object whose type determines which layer to nullify.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the tile's occupants.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A string in the format {Card, Modifier, Mover}.

    • getTooltip

      public Tooltip getTooltip()
      Aggregates tooltips from all active components on this tile.
      Specified by:
      getTooltip in interface Tippable
      Returns:
      A combined Tooltip for the card, modifier, and mover.
